/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/qmmp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/builtincommandlineoption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/qmmpstarter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/qmmp_autogen/4UGIYD6VGQ/qrc_images.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qmmp.dir/qmmp_autogen/YTRUC5LEIS/qrc_qmmp_locales.cpp.o -o qmmp  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmpui:/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib:/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmp: ../qmmpui/libqmmpui.so.2.3.1 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.5.3 ../qmmp/libqmmp.so.2.3.1 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
